title: polystichum stenophyllum
intro: Polystichum stenophyllum is a species of fern native to China, also known as the Chinese sword fern. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polystichum stenophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be dried and used in herbal blends.
